records.m_Talk_ENG: He is also destined to die alongside his wife tonight. A rather important turning point in my plans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their deaths are the result of the devastating effects which people refer to as coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I did was... calculate the outcomes of the coincidences, but never intervene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why did you go talk to him? What if you said something that throws everything off course?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is what I learned from Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weil ich das von meinem Vater gelernt habe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'est quelque chose que j'ai appris de mon p958re.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you are not going to save someone, the least you can do is remember who they were.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Si tu ne comptes pas sauver quelqu'un, fais au moins en sorte de te souvenir de lui.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my... You're more considerate than I had thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ... Wow. Du bist r9588cksichtsvoller, als ich gedacht hatte.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why? Did I say something that's not true?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm ? J'ai dit quelque chose qui ne fallait pas ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... But it is something that I have never considered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ... Nein. Aber es ist etwas, wor9588ber ich noch nie zuvor nachgedacht habe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My actions are simply the outcome of my calculations. The concept of "affection" was never taken into account when I was created.

Meine Handlungen sind einfach das Ergebnis meiner Berechnungen. Das Konzept der 
88Zuneigung
8n wurde bei meiner Sch9582pfung nicht ber9588cksichtigt.

Hmm... Anh th87c s87 tin 96ei87
9u 96e959 sao?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not know. It cannot be computed as of right now.
